title: InventoryFullAlert
description: A status bar that shows how full your inventory is
body:
A status bar that shows how full your inventory is

Edit the positions, width, and colors in the config json or with ClothConfig and ModMenu.

For a 1920x1080 screen with GUI scale 2, these settings align things mostly correctly:

"x": 368,
  "y": 482,
  "barWidth": 108,

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/AH-T6X4maIY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
